reviews.text:
Winne is a top-notch elopement & micro-wedding planner!!
From the start of our wedding planning journey, she was warm, prompt and professional!! She stayed on top of me when I was slacking on wedding detail decisions and made sure everything was sorted well before the big day. She made sure to have multiple virtual check-ins with us throughout the planning process. Even though she was working with us from out of state, she did an bang-up job of researching and securing vendors. As part of her services, she covers a portion of florals which was awesome!

When we did run into a speed bump the day before our wedding, she was instantly solution-finding and went the extra mile to pick up a floral arrangement 30 mins away from our venue. Having our planner/coordinator on-site day of was key! The piece of mind that came with knowing she was nearby and ready to handle any curveballs allowed me, my husband and our families to just enjoy the day. Her one woman set-up of our reception area was so dreamy, better than anything I could envision!! She has a magic touch!

We would absolutely recommend For Wild Love for your elopement/small wedding day.

Winnie is an amazing wedding day planner! She went above and beyond helping us to plan for our daughter’s special day and it was so beautiful! Winnie took the time to go through every single detail, right down to the smallest one, to make sure the wedding was exactly what our daughter wanted! She is very thoughtful and kind and was patient with us through all the months of planning! Her experience and knowledge of wedding planning made our event just what our daughter wanted, and then some! Thank you, Winnie, for making her wedding day a beautiful, stress free day! We loved every minute of it!!  ❤️💕💖
Winnie provided such a wonderful service for us! We are out of state and having her help was a MUST! We couldn’t have put together such a beautiful celebration without her. She is amazing!

Hiring Winnie to plan and design my small adventure wedding in Colorado was one of the best decisions we made. We wanted to plan an adventurous day with our close family and friends but with so many different ideas, we didn’t know where to start. Winnie was one of the first people we hired and thank goodness we did! She had incredible vendor recommendations (who were just as awesome to work with), incorporated all of our scattered details and ideas for the day into a timeline that made sense, and even gave myself and our guests great ideas to do in the area outside of our wedding day.

Winnie is warm, thoughtful, creative, organized and very knowledgeable. I may have gone to her with one to many questions throughout the planning process, but she was always there to guide me through my indecisiveness with a smile on her face.  Not only was she everything we wanted in a planner behind the scenes, but the day of the wedding went so smoothly and felt so low stress for us. Multiple friends and family even commented on how smoothly everything ran. It was the best weekend ever and we couldn’t have done it without Winnie!

Collaborating with Winnie at For Wild Love was an absolute delight! From the outset, she made the wedding planning journey easy and enjoyable. Winnie's consistent communication kept me on track, and her wealth of advice alleviated any potential stress. With her expert guidance, our special day unfolded seamlessly, exceeding all expectations. Winnie's dedication and attention to detail ensured perfection, and our wedding was nothing short of magical. I wholeheartedly recommend Winnie's services at For Wild Love; you won't be disappointed!
